workflows.name: Complaint Submitted Notification
workflows.description: Sent when a citizen submits a new complaint

steps.name: send-sms
steps.template: Your complaint {{complaintNo}} for {{serviceName}} has been registered on {{submittedDate}}. We will address it soon.

steps.name: send-whatsapp
steps.template: Hello! Your complaint *{{complaintNo}}* for *{{serviceName}}* has been successfully registered on {{submittedDate}}. Our team will review and address it shortly. You can track the status anytime.

steps.name: send-email
steps.subject: Complaint Registered: {{complaintNo}}
steps.template:
Complaint Registered Successfully

Dear Citizen,

Your complaint {{complaintNo}} for {{serviceName}} has been registered on {{submittedDate}}.

We will address it at the earliest.

workflows.name: Complaint Assigned Notification
workflows.description: Sent when a complaint is assigned to a staff member

steps.name: send-sms
steps.template: Your complaint {{complaintNo}} has been assigned to {{departmentName}}. {{assigneeName}} ({{assigneeDesignation}}) will handle it.

steps.name: send-whatsapp
steps.template:
Update on complaint *{{complaintNo}}*

Assigned to: *{{departmentName}}*
Handler: {{assigneeName}} ({{assigneeDesignation}})

They will start working on your {{serviceName}} issue soon.

workflows.name: Complaint Resolved Notification
workflows.description: Sent when a complaint has been resolved

steps.name: send-sms
steps.template: Good news! Your complaint {{complaintNo}} for {{serviceName}} has been resolved by {{assigneeName}}.

steps.name: send-whatsapp
steps.template:
✅ *Complaint Resolved!*

Your complaint *{{complaintNo}}* for *{{serviceName}}* submitted on {{submittedDate}} has been successfully resolved by {{assigneeName}}.

Thank you for your patience!

workflows.name: Complaint Rejected Notification
workflows.description: Sent when a complaint is rejected

steps.name: send-sms
steps.template: Your complaint {{complaintNo}} has been closed. Reason: {{comment}}

steps.name: send-whatsapp
steps.template:
Complaint *{{complaintNo}}* Update

Your complaint for *{{serviceName}}* submitted on {{submittedDate}} has been closed.

Reason: {{comment}}

For queries, please contact our support.

customWorkflows.name: Payment Reminder
customWorkflows.description: Example custom workflow - modify or remove as needed

steps.name: send-sms
steps.template: Payment reminder: {{amount}} due on {{dueDate}}. Pay at: {{paymentLink}}

steps.name: send-whatsapp
